subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the Most Glorious Beauty! Whatsoever thou seekest, thou shalt find naught save the bounties of the Ancient One, and whatsoever thou pursuest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه جمال ابهی آنچه بجوای جز ایت الطاف قدم نیابی و آنچه بپوای جز
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
